name: GUARDI.HEALTH NEW DL-,001
summary: GUARDI.HEALTH NEW DL-,001 is likely referring to Guardion Health Sciences, Inc., a specialty health sciences company focused on developing, commercializing and distributing condition-specific medical foods with an initial focus on products that support the health of the retina. Their products include Lumega-Z, a medical food for dry age-related macular degeneration. Guardion Health Sciences is headquartered in San Diego, California.
